content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.news-medical.net/news/20241001/Time-restricted-eating-could-offer-health-benefits-to-adults-with-metabolic-syndrome.aspx", "source_title": "Time-restricted eating could offer health benefits to adults with ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Patients who ate within a consistent eight-to-ten-hour window each day for three months saw improvements in several markers of blood sugar...", "direct_quote": "Patients who ate within a consistent eight-to-ten-hour window each day for three months saw improvements in several markers of blood sugar regulation and metabolic function compared to those who received standard treatments.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Manoogian says this personalized approach made the intervention easier for patients to complete, compared to other intermittent fasting...", "direct_quote": "Manoogian says this personalized approach made the intervention easier for patients to complete, compared to other intermittent fasting studies, which typically assign the same strict time window to all participants.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "In the study, 108 adults with metabolic syndrome were randomly sorted into either the time-restricted eating group or the control group.", "direct_quote": "In the study, 108 adults with metabolic syndrome were randomly sorted into either the time-restricted eating group or the control group.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Time-restricted eating could offer health benefits to adults."}]}
